25b-nboh.dose_note: NOTE: There is limited information on this drug. Caution is advised.
25b-nboh.name: 25b-nboh

properties.dose: Sublingually Light: 200-400ug Common: 400-800ug Strong: 800ug-1mg. | NOTE: There is limited information on this drug. Caution is advised.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A phenethylamine psychedelic  and stimulant derivative of 2C-B, this compound is related to and has similar effects to 25b-NBOMe. It is significantly more potent than 2C-B  but less potent than 25B-NBOMe. Overdoses of NBOH compounds may cause  dangerous vasoconstriction. The drug may induce uncomfortable body load.
